title: EPIC SNAX CO American Style Giant Pink & White Toastin’ Marshmallows - Fluffy Sweet & Gluten Free Perfect For Roasting, 500 g (Pack of 1)
features: SWEET TREAT: Indulge in these epic American-style giant marshmallows, perfect for roasting over a campfire, BBQ, or fire pit—ideal for making gooey s’mores or a sweet toastie while camping
GLUTEN-FREE: Enjoy the fluffy, sweet goodness of these pink and white marshmallows guilt-free with their gluten-free recipe—perfect for everyone around the campfire or BBQ
GIANT SIZE: Generous 500g pack size ensures you have plenty to share or to satisfy your craving for more delicious treats—great for s’mores, toasties, or snacking while camping
FUN COLOURS: The pink and white marshmallows add a fun touch to any occasion and make roasting them even more exciting—especially when making colourful s’mores or toastie-style desserts
QUALITY FLAVOUR: Epic Snax Co brings you premium quality toastin’ marshmallows that are bound to become your new favourite treat—perfect for s’mores nights, camping trips, or sweet toastie creations
description: Product Description Bring the excitement of a classic campfire treat right into your kitchen with EPIC SNAX CO Giant Toastin’ Marshmallows—the ultimate indulgence for marshmallow lovers of all ages. These oversized pink and white marshmallows aren’t just eye-catching—they’re crafted for maximum gooey goodness, making them perfect for roasting over an open flame, melting into rich hot chocolate, or layering into decadent desserts like s’mores and sweet toasties. With their light, fluffy texture and sweet vanilla flavour, each bite delivers a nostalgic taste of fireside fun, whether you're out camping, hosting a BBQ, or simply cozying up at home. Toast them to golden perfection for that irresistible caramelised crunch, or enjoy them straight from the bag as a soft, chewy snack. From family gatherings to solo sweet cravings, these marshmallows guarantee a gooey, delicious experience that turns any moment into a treat. Ingredients "INGREDIENTS", "Glucose Fructose Syrup, Sugar,", "Water, Dextrose Starch of Maize", "Pork Gelotine Flavouring, Colour", "Beetroot Red" Directions Roast over a campfire or BBQ until golden brown and gooey. Manufacturer Contact Information Petty Wood & Co Ltd, Livingstone Road, Walworth Business Park, Andover, SP10 5NS See more
